title: Cozy's Improved Wolves
description: A complete upgrade of pet wolves ✰ Pet wolves have personality, helpful abilities, and can be respawned!
body:
![All Wolf Variants - Tamed and Named](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff615a21205ad482d34e7e2fa1a1de83a4cedda8_0.webp)

# Cozy's Improved Wolves (Now Available for Forge!)

Make every wolf feel like a real companion. Build trust through care, track their unique stats, and keep them safe with soul-bound collars. Adds personality, and soul-bound loyalty.

**Bring your wolves to life. Build stories. Form bonds.**

If you've ever loved a Minecraft wolf, this is the mod that makes them feel alive - and keeps them by your side. ✧

[![Available on CurseForge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cozys-improved-wolves)
[![Available on Modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cozys-improved-wolves)
![Available for Fabric](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png)
![Available for Forge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/supported/forge_64h.png)
[![Join the Discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/9u4dnSpyjJ)

> **📖 Wiki / Full Feature Guide → https://cozysimprovedmobs.netlify.app/**

## Why Players Install
- **Never lose a best friend**: Tamed wolves drop a Wolf Collar into their owner's inventory on death. Use it on a block to revive your wolf. No more needing to leave your pets at home for safety.
- **Bonding that matters**: Pet, scratch, and interact (sneak + right-click with an empty hand) with visible progress and affectionate feedback.
- **Unique companions**: Randomized stats (health, attack, speed, gift chance, wander range), class (Hunter/Gatherer), and optional gender.
- **Roles with real behavior**: Hunters gift items after kills; Gatherers dig up gifts and deliver them to you.
- **Expressive behavior**: Wolves emote based on weather, time, and their bond with their owner. They react to the world, teleport smartly, show affection, and follow when tempted with food.
- **Multiplayer friendly**: Optional friendly-fire protection and owner-only breeding.

## How It Works
- **Automatic upgrade**: Vanilla wolves become Improved Wolves (keeps name, variant, owner, and collar color).
- **Custom taming**: Use **Ancient Bones**. They drop from skeletons or can be traded from clerics. Vanilla bone taming can be enabled in config.
- **Ancient Bone bonus**: Use Ancient Bones on tamed wolves to grant them a short random positive effect.
- **Stat inspection**: Sneak + right-click a tamed wolf with a **Training Stick** to view their full stat sheet.

## Classes & Gifts
- **Hunter**: Stronger combat focus and gifts triggered by kills.
- **Gatherer**: Digs up gifts and delivers them when nearby.

## Items
- **Ancient Bone** (taming + buffs)
- **Ancient Bone Meal** (applies bone meal multiple times per use)
- **Training Stick** (stat inspection)
- **Wolf Collar** (revival)

## Compatibility & Requirements
- **Loader**: Fabric
- **Minecraft**: 1.19.2, 1.20, 1.20.1, 1.21, 1.21.4, 1.21.5-1.21.11
- **Required**: Fabric API, Cloth Config
- **Optional**: Mod Menu (for in-game config UI)

## Configuration
- Config file: `config/cozys-improved-wolves.json`
- Reload command: `/reloadcozywolvesconfig` (server operators)

## ⚠️ Important: Read Before Installing on Existing Worlds

This mod replaces vanilla wolves with **custom wolf entities** in order to support its features (personality, abilities, respawn system, etc.).

### Uninstall warning

If you **remove this mod** and then load your world, wolves that were converted/managed by this mod may **disappear permanently** because the custom entity no longer exists without the mod installed.

### Before uninstalling

* **Back up your world first**
* Do **not** open the world without the mod unless you accept the risk of losing modded wolves
* If you already removed the mod and loaded the world, recovery may only be possible from a **backup**
